name: Sec Red NCD 8.85% Sr.IV
summary: Sec Red NCD 8.85% Sr.IV represents a secured, redeemable, non-convertible debenture issued by Shriram Transport Finance Limited, offering a fixed interest rate of 8.85% and belonging to Series IV of the issuance; it is a debt instrument used by the company to raise capital from the public; Shriram Transport Finance Limited is an asset financing NBFC focused on providing financing solutions to commercial vehicle owners.
